title: Smallest K-Length Subsequence With Occurrences of a Letter
titleCn: 含特定字母的最小子序列

testcases.input: s = "leet", k = 3, letter = "e", repetition = 1 Output: "eet" Explanation: There are four subsequences of length 3 that have the letter 'e' appear at least 1 time: - "lee" (from "leet") - "let" (from "leet") - "let" (from "leet") - "eet" (from "leet") The lexicographically smallest subsequence among them is "eet".
testcases.expectedOutput: "eet" Explanation: There are four subsequences of length 3 that have the letter 'e' appear at least 1 time: - "lee" (from "leet") - "let" (from "leet") - "let" (from "leet") - "eet" (from "leet") The lexicographically smallest subsequence among them is "eet".

testcases.input: s = "leetcode", k = 4, letter = "e", repetition = 2 Output: "ecde" Explanation: "ecde" is the lexicographically smallest subsequence of length 4 that has the letter "e" appear at least 2 times.
testcases.expectedOutput: "ecde" Explanation: "ecde" is the lexicographically smallest subsequence of length 4 that has the letter "e" appear at least 2 times.

testcases.input: s = "bb", k = 2, letter = "b", repetition = 2 Output: "bb" Explanation: "bb" is the only subsequence of length 2 that has the letter "b" appear at least 2 times.
testcases.expectedOutput: "bb" Explanation: "bb" is the only subsequence of length 2 that has the letter "b" appear at least 2 times.
